audit.summary: Extraction is faithful and complete. All major sections from the live page are present in the same order: hero, intros, feature-splits with correct images and copy, two CTA blocks, press quotes (4 items with correct logos and quotes), and testimonials (3 LinkedIn cards with correct names, roles, avatars, and URLs). Image sources match live (including the SVG illustrations in the "3 règles d'or" section which are intentionally illustrative, not product mockups). Body content with embedded links is preserved. Title highlights are correctly extracted from the <strong> tags on live.
